title: WKS Queue
description: A work queue cases can be routed to. Part of the WKS Case Configuration Standard.

name.description: Display name. NOTE: case actions reference queues by this name, not by id.

_id.description: Storage envelope field. Not part of the logical config contract.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the WKS Case Configuration Standard this document conforms to. Absent/null is treated as the 1.0 baseline.
